div.div:
Mid-create dispose (issue #1): if _disposed becomes true while create() is in flight,
initialize() calls _api.dispose(response.playerId) and throws disposed.

(invalidKey, fileNotFound, corruptStream, adapterNotRegistered, drmError,
platformNotSupported, disposed) or falls back to unknown.
